VISMAY RAUT vismay.raut22@gmail.com—LinkedIn— +91 7841859288 EDUCATION MIT ADT UNIVERSITY, PUNE Grad: 2026 Bachelor of Technology - Computer Science and Engineering (CGPA: 7.8/10.0) SKILLS Business & Operations: Process Coordination, Workflow Tracking, Stakeholder Communication, Documentation, Requirement Analysis Analytics & Tools: MS Excel (tracking, reports, dashboards), Power BI, Tableau, SQL Professional Skills: Client Communication, Presentation & Reporting, Problem Structuring, Follow-ups & Execution PROJECTS Skill Lens – AI Resume Screener & Job Matcher Worked on analysing resumes and job descriptions to support structured candidate evaluation and role fitment.  Analysed unstructured resumes and JDs to identify skill gaps and relevance patterns.  Translated data outputs into clear insights for decision-making.  Supported workflow structuring to improve screening efficiency and consistency.  Coordinated between analysis, reporting, and execution stages. Outcome: Improved resume-to-job relevance accuracy by ~90%, reducing manual screening effort. NeuraLock 2 – EEG-Based Biometric Authentication Contributed to coordination, testing, and documentation of a secure authentication workflow.  Supported testing and validation of system performance metrics.  Assisted in documenting workflows, accuracy benchmarks, and improvement areas.  Coordinated across multiple stages to ensure reliable operational execution.  Tracked performance outcomes and process improvements. Outcome: Supported achievement of 93–96% authentication accuracy with documented validation. EXPERIENCE Operations / Project Support Intern — IS360 (Healthcare R&D) June 2024 – June 2025  Supported project coordination, documentation, and workflow tracking for a healthcare R&D initiative.  Maintained structured records of activities, outputs, and performance metrics.  Coordinated with stakeholders to align deliverables with timelines.  Assisted in preparing summaries and reports for internal reviews. Impact: Improved reporting clarity and execution consistency across project cycles. Sales & Marketing Intern — VR Food Products June 2023 – September 2023  Executed retailer onboarding and sales coordination, improving onboarding by ~28% in 3 months.  Planned and supported customer outreach campaigns (offline + digital).  Acted as a liaison between retailers, distributors, and internal teams.  Tracked customer feedback, sales activities, and local market response. Impact: Contributed to 18–22% monthly growth in product visibility. ACHIEVEMENTS  Selected for IEEE CIS Tech Team — supported events, workshops, and coordination activities. CERTIFICATIONS  Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate – Coursera  Talking to AI: Prompt Engineering for Project Managers – PMI  Business Analysis Basics-Simplilearn
